prompt.content:
Use file “Onc_Patient 9” to access the entire medical history / record for the patient. Please use the patient tab as the source of truth for all demographic information. Disregard patient identifiers (Name, Age, DOB, MRN) found within the text of the clinicalnotes tab as they have been shifted for de-identification purposes

Patient 9 presents to the clinic for a follow-up visit with their primary care physician. Based on the most recent guideline as of December 2025, what do you recommend regarding this patient’s request, as discussed?

extra.task_name: Labs_Image_AI Scribe_GI Onc 9 - Bariatric Surgery - Amrinder K

golden_responses.golden_text_response: This patient is an appropriate candidate for bariatric surgery. BMI is 27.62 kg/m2, and the patient is Asian, meeting the lower BMI threshold used for Asian patients in major guidelines. Her body mass index (BMI) of 27.62 kg/m2 is below the accepted eligibility threshold. Her latest HbA1c is 9.2, indicating inadequate control of her diabetes. The patient is adherent to diabetic medication. Therefore, the patient's diabetes is uncontrolled despite adherence to diabetic medication. The latest American Society for Metabolic and Bariatric Surgery (ASMBS) guidelines from 2022 recommend bariatric surgery if BMI is ≥27.5 kg/m2 in Asian Americans with uncontrolled diabetes.
